settings.heading: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Shipping: Free USPS ground shipping over $50 within the United States. Need it quicker? Opt for UPS or Fedex, 2-Day or Overnight at checkout.

Returns: Free returns within the United States (30-day return policy). Full refunds are provided for items returned in unused and undamaged condition. Custom team gear, personalized items, or special order items are not eligible for returns. Some sales on standard items may also have return restrictions.

settings.heading: Made in the USA
settings.content:
Proudly American-Made Materials: The majority of our components are sourced from the USA, including our industry-leading 100% American-made cut-resistant fabrics.

Sustainability That Matters: Our approach prioritizes cleaner energy sources, using renewable energy, significantly reducing our carbon footprint.

Efficient, Reliable Delivery: With distribution hubs in Florida, we ensure quick and dependable delivery to your door.

Ethics and Excellence at Every Step: By keeping production at home, we support American jobs, maintain transparency, and uphold the highest standards of environmental responsibility.

settings.heading: Product Disclamer
settings.content:
Products offering “cut resistance” and “cut protection” do not 100% prevent or eliminate cut injuries or lacerations, especially against powered blades or sharp equipment.

The information provided by Titan Battlegear is based on current knowledge and is intended as guidance for your decisions or product selections.

Titan Battlegear’s cut protection products are highly resistant to cuts, but they are not completely cut-proof. Nothing is 100% cut-proof under all conditions.

The Battlegear collection provides a very high level of protection, but caution is advised during use. Despite their high resistance to cuts, there is always a possibility that objects could penetrate these products under certain circumstances.

settings.heading: Care Instructions
settings.content:
• Hand or Machine Wash, Cold
  • Line or Tumble Dry, No Heat
  • No Bleach
  • Do Not Iron or Dry Clean

settings.title: What Makes Titan Battlegear The Safest?
settings.text: Titan Battlegear's hockey neck guard utilizes advanced American-made cut-resistant materials and a unique collar design to maximize coverage of critical zones.

settings.title: Other Brands Use Kevlar®, Why is Titan’s Titanotex™ Cut Resistance is Better?
settings.text:
Most Kevlar® fabrics offer an ISO 13997:1999 blade cut resistance level 2, and in very rare occasions level 3 (on a scale of 1 to 5).

Titan's hockey neck guard shirt utilizes proprietary, American made fabrics, delivering the highest cut-resistance: level A9, which makes it 200 stronger than steel, and almost 5 times more cut resistant than Kevlar® products rated level 3 at 5N.

settings.title: Are there certifications for the USA Hockey mandated laceration protection?
settings.text:
Unfortunately USA hockey does not have any certification requirements currently.

They state “Players are required to wear a neck laceration protector that is commercially designed and manufactured for that purpose.”

We are eager for them to enforce stricter guidelines around the level of protection to qualify as “neck laceration protectors” for the Aug 1, 2024 mandate.

In our testing of other products available in the market, we revealed a very low level of cut resistance due to materials such as Kevlar®, which only provide a level 2 or 3 cut-resistance, depending on fabric weight.

Titan shirts achieve up to a level A9 cut-resistance, the highest level of cut protection in the world.

settings.title: How Safe Is The Shirt After Many Washes?
settings.text:
We tested cleaning with cycles across TEN Durawash twin-tub industrial machines. This is equivalent to 50 washes in a domestic washing machine.

The cut resistance level, following this washing process increased by 4%. Test reports from INTERTEK are available upon request.

settings.title: Where Are Titan's Products Produced?
settings.text:
The United States of America! Titan was born in Florida and produced in St. Paul, MN, and has additional factories in North Carolina, New Jersey, and New York.

The mass market and other independent brands produce in China, with questionable labor practices and superficial cut resistance certifications.

settings.title: Can I Customize Titan's Hockey Neck Guard Shirt With My Team Logo/Colors?
settings.text: Yes, Titan's TeamWorks program offers custom gear for teams, as well as personalization by player, including name, number, and even their country flag to represent their nationality!
